name: button-group
description: Visually joins a set of related buttons into a single segmented control

meta.name: ButtonGroup
meta.description: Visually joins a set of related buttons into a single segmented control

props.name: roving
props.description: When true, uses roving tabindex so arrow keys move focus between buttons.

props.name: loop
props.description: When true, navigation wraps around from end to start.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label used when no visible label is present.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Id of the element that labels this component.

whenToUse: Presenting several related, independent actions that read as one control (e.g. an editor toolbar)
Visually grouping buttons that share context without implying mutual exclusivity
whenNotToUse: The buttons represent a single selected value among options — use ToggleGroup
The actions are unrelated and should read as separate buttons — lay them out with spacing instead

antiPatterns.why: A group with no accessible name is announced as an unlabeled region; supply aria-label or aria-labelledby

related.name: ToggleGroup
related.reason: Use when the buttons select a value rather than fire independent actions

related.name: Button
related.reason: A button group is a layout container for buttons

intent.a11yRationale: Exposes role="group" so assistive tech treats the buttons as one labeled set; optional roving focus lets arrow keys traverse the buttons as a single tab stop, matching toolbar expectations

content.tone: Imperative verb-first labels on each child button
content.notes: Keep child labels parallel in form and length so the segmented control reads evenly

flexibility.note: Outer corner radius must resolve to --cascivo-button-radius / --cascivo-radius-control to match standalone buttons
Any focusable controls (Button, IconButton, links) may be grouped
